item.title: GPT-5.6 正式上线，Codex 并入 ChatGPT
item.description:
OpenAI officially released the GPT-5.6 series, including three models: the flagship Sol, the balanced Terra, and the cost-effective Luna. OpenAI 正式发布 GPT-5.6 系列，包含旗舰款 Sol、均衡款 Terra 和性价比款 Luna 三个型号。

🔗 Related reading: Overnight, GPT-5.6 arrived, Codex disappeared, and Claude got anxious. 🔗 相关阅读： 一夜之间，GPT-5.6 来了，Codex 没了，Claude 急了

The official announcement states that Sol scored 53.6 in the Agents' Last Exam, a long-range agent evaluation across 55 industries, which is 13.1 points higher than Claude Fable 5. In terms of programming, Sol achieved a record-breaking 80 points on the Artificial Analysis Programming Agent Index, outputting less than half the tokens of Fable 5 and costing about one-third less. 官方宣称，Sol 在跨 55 个行业的长程智能体评测 Agents’ Last Exam 中得分 53.6，比 Claude Fable 5 高出 13.1 分；编程方面，Sol 在 Artificial Analysis 编程智能体指数上取得 80 分，刷新纪录，输出 token 不到 Fable 5 一半，成本便宜约三分之一。

    Improved design judgment, capable of generating aesthetically pleasing interfaces based on high-level directions, and using enhanced computer operation capabilities to check rendering results, self-discover and correct problems before delivery;

    Significant improvement in knowledge office scenarios, capable of more accurately inferring the design system of reference documents and applying it to new content, with improved formula accuracy and typesetting quality for PPTs, documents, and spreadsheets;

    Added an ultra inference tier, which by default schedules 4 AI agents to work in parallel, expandable up to 16, suitable for high-intensity tasks;

    Significant improvement in cybersecurity capabilities, with ExploitBench score rising from 47.9% in the previous generation to 73.5%.

GPT-5.6 adds Programmatic Tool Calling, allowing the model to write lightweight programs to coordinate tool calls, supporting Zero Data Retention (ZDR). Pricing is: Sol $5 per million input tokens, $30 for output; Terra $2.5 and $15; Luna $1 and $6. GPT-5.6 新增 Programmatic Tool Calling，模型可自行编写轻量程序协调工具调用，支持零数据保留（ZDR）。定价为：Sol 每百万 token 输入 5 美元、输出 30 美元；Terra 为 2.5 美元和 15 美元；Luna 为 1 美元和 6 美元。

OpenAI also announced that the Codex App has been integrated into the ChatGPT desktop application, with Chat, Work, and Codex modes consolidated into a single entry point. The original ChatGPT desktop application has been renamed ChatGPT Classic. OpenAI 还宣布 Codex App 并入 ChatGPT 桌面应用，Chat、Work、Codex 三个模式整合为同一入口，原 ChatGPT 桌面应用改名为 ChatGPT Classic。

item.title: 花呗崩了，客服致歉：系统升级已完成，还款有三天宽限期
item.guid: 花呗崩了，客服致歉：系统升级已完成，还款有三天宽限期
item.description:
According to China Newsweek, on the evening of July 8, a large number of users reported that Alipay's Huabei repayment page could not be opened normally. Screenshots uploaded by users showed a "network busy" prompt after entering the Huabei page, or "Due to institutional maintenance, bills are temporarily unavailable" displayed on the bill page. 据中新经纬报道，7 月 8 日晚间，大量用户反映支付宝花呗还款页面无法正常打开。用户上传的截图显示，进入花呗页面后出现「网络繁忙」提示，或在账单页面显示「因机构维护，账单暂时无法查看」。

In response, Alipay customer service responded yesterday that the system upgrade has been completed, Huabei can be used normally, and apologized for the inconvenience caused by the outage. Customer service also reminded that Huabei has a three-day grace period, and users who complete repayments within the grace period will not affect their credit. 对此，支付宝客服昨日回应称，目前系统升级已完成，花呗可正常使用，并就此次故障带来的不便表示歉意。客服同时提示，花呗设有三天宽限期，用户在宽限期内完成还款不会影响征信。

item.title: 阶跃星辰将发布全球首款智能体手机
item.guid: 阶跃星辰将发布全球首款智能体手机
item.description:
Jieyue Xingchen is about to launch a new terminal brand, agent system, and the world's first AI agent phone. Compared to the AI features currently emphasized by phone manufacturers, Jieyue may redefine AI-native terminal devices. 阶跃星辰即将推出全新终端品牌、智能体系统以及全球首款 AI 智能体手机。相比目前手机厂商主打的 AI 功能，阶跃或将重新定义 AI 原生终端设备。

According to informed sources, Jieyue will focus on the agent system, creating a new interactive experience centered around AI Agents, pushing phones to evolve from tools into true personal companions. OpenAI had previously announced its AI terminal plans, but this time domestic players have taken the lead. 据知情人士透露，阶跃将在智能体系统侧发力，围绕 AI Agent 打造全新的交互体验，推动手机从工具进化为真正的个人伙伴。OpenAI 此前也已公布 AI 终端计划，而这次被国内玩家率先抢跑。

item.title: 微信新增转账红包「一键直达」功能
item.guid: 微信新增转账红包「一键直达」功能
item.description:
Yesterday, WeChat added a "one-click direct access" feature for transfers and red packets. 昨天，微信新增转账、红包的「一键直达」功能。

When there are uncollected red packets or unconfirmed transfers in the chat window, a corresponding icon will automatically appear in the upper right corner of the interface. Clicking it will directly jump to the location of that message, eliminating the need to manually scroll up through chat history. 当聊天窗口内存在未领取的红包或未确认收款的转账时，界面右上角将自动出现对应标识，点击后可直接跳转至该消息所在位置，无需手动向上翻阅聊天记录。

item.title: 借助 AI 气象大模型发台风预测，网络博主涉嫌违反《气象法》
item.guid: 借助-AI-气象大模型发台风预测，网络博主涉嫌违反《气象法》
item.description:
After Typhoon "Bavi," the 9th typhoon of the year, entered China's 48-hour alert line on July 8, several online bloggers began to use open-source AI meteorological large models to self-publish typhoon path predictions and rainfall forecasts on social platforms. Some bloggers, under the name "weather enthusiasts," also offered paid prediction services for specific locations, charging about 10 yuan per service. 今年第 9 号台风「巴威」于 7 月 8 日进入我国 48 小时警戒线后，多名网络博主开始借助开源 AI 气象大模型，在社交平台自行发布台风路径预测和降雨预测，部分博主还以「天气爱好者」为名，针对特定地点提供付费预测服务，每次收费约 10 元。

In response, legal experts explicitly stated that such behavior is suspected of being illegal. The "Meteorological Law of the People's Republic of China" stipulates that public weather forecasts and disaster weather warnings implement a unified release system, and the releasing entities can only be meteorological stations affiliated with meteorological authorities. 对此，法律专家明确表示，相关行为已涉嫌违法。《中华人民共和国气象法》规定，公众气象预报和灾害性天气警报实行统一发布制度，发布主体只能是气象主管机构所属的气象台站。

Li Lei, an associate professor at Zhongnan University of Economics and Law, pointed out that if bloggers only analyze academic materials and meteorological data without making forecasts, it does not constitute a violation; however, if individuals directly publish weather forecasts, it is suspected of violating the law. 中南财经政法大学副教授李雷指出，若博主仅分析学术资料和气象数据、未作出预报，则不涉嫌违规；但若个人直接发布气象预报，则涉嫌违反该法。

item.title: OpenClaw 成立非营利基金会，英伟达、微软、OpenAI 等多方成为合作伙伴
item.guid: OpenClaw-成立非营利基金会，英伟达、微软、OpenAI-等多方成为合作伙伴
item.description:
OpenClaw announced yesterday the establishment of the OpenClaw Foundation, operating independently as a U.S. 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. The project continues to maintain its MIT license, remaining open and not controlled by a single commercial entity. OpenClaw 昨日宣布成立 OpenClaw 基金会，以美国 501(c)(3) 非营利组织身份独立运营，项目继续保持 MIT 授权、开放且不受单一商业主体控制。

Project founder Peter Steinberger has joined OpenAI, but he clarified that "OpenAI hired me, not OpenClaw," and the foundation "has no owners, only sponsors." 项目创始人 Peter Steinberger 已加入 OpenAI，但他澄清「OpenAI 雇用的是我，而非 OpenClaw」，基金会「没有所有者，只有赞助商」。

This is OpenClaw's first time forming a full-time team, led by Chief Architect Vincent Koc. In terms of collaborations, NVIDIA launched NemoClaw to support local private deployment, Microsoft released its enterprise-grade autonomous agent product Microsoft Scout based on OpenClaw technology, and the University of Michigan became the largest donor and established the Institute for Agent Computing. OpenAI also pledged to support the foundation's independent hosting status. 这是 OpenClaw 首次组建全职团队，由首席架构师 Vincent Koc 领衔。合作方面，英伟达推出 NemoClaw 支持本地私有部署，微软基于 OpenClaw 技术发布企业级自主智能体产品 Microsoft Scout，密歇根大学成为最大捐款方并成立智能体计算研究所。OpenAI 也承诺支持基金会的独立托管地位。

According to the official announcement, OpenClaw currently adds 4.5 million active instances weekly. The foundation's goal is to become "the Switzerland of AI" – a neutral platform where major models and laboratories can jointly connect. 据官方公告，OpenClaw 目前每周新增 450 万活跃实例，基金会目标是成为「AI 领域的瑞士」——各大模型与实验室共同接入的中立平台。

item.title: 6 月汽车出口首破百万辆，同比增长 75.1%
item.guid: 6-月汽车出口首破百万辆，同比增长-75.1%
item.description:
The China Association of Automobile Manufacturers announced data yesterday showing that in the first half of this year, domestic new energy vehicle production and sales both exceeded 7 million units, increasing by 6.7% and 7.3% year-on-year, respectively. 中国汽车工业协会昨日公布数据显示，今年上半年，国内新能源汽车产量和销量双双突破 700 万辆，同比分别增长 6.7% 和 7.3%。

Regarding exports, in June, monthly automobile exports historically exceeded 1 million units for the first time, a year-on-year increase of 75.1%. The market performance of Chinese brand passenger vehicles also continued its strong momentum, with their monthly sales share exceeding 75% in June. 出口方面，6 月单月汽车出口量历史首次突破 100 万辆，同比增长 75.1%。中国品牌乘用车的市场表现同样延续强势，6 月月度销量占比超过 75%。

However, looking at the overall market, from January to June this year, the combined sales of the top fifteen automobile groups totaled 13.979 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 4%, indicating overall pressure on leading groups. 不过，从整体市场来看，今年 1 月至 6 月，销量排名前十五位的汽车集团合计销量为 1397.9 万辆，同比下降 4%，头部集团整体承压。

item.title: 立讯精密港股上市首日破发，盘中最大跌幅逾 7%
item.guid: 立讯精密港股上市首日破发，盘中最大跌幅逾-7%
item.description:
Yesterday, Luxshare Precision officially listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, completing its 'A+H' dual-listing layout. Its performance on the first day of listing was weaker than expected, quickly falling below the offering price after opening, with a maximum intraday drop of 7.16%, touching a low of HK$58.70 per share. As of closing, Luxshare Precision's Hong Kong stock price was HK$64.46, with a full-day decline of 1.49%. 昨日，立讯精密正式在港交所上市，完成「A+H」两地上市布局。上市首日走势弱于预期，开盘后迅速跌破发行价，盘中最大跌幅达 7.16%，最低触及 58.70 港元/股。截至收盘，立讯精密港股股价报 64.46 港元，全天跌幅为 1.49%。

The total global offering of H-shares this time was 383 million shares, with a final offering price of HK$63.28 per share, raising a total of HK$24.266 billion. After deducting listing-related expenses, the net proceeds were approximately HK$24.039 billion, making it the largest IPO on the Hong Kong stock market this year. 本次 H 股全球发售总量为 3.83 亿股，最终发行价为每股 63.28 港元，募资总额达 242.66 亿港元，扣除上市相关费用后净额约 240.39 亿港元，成为今年以来港股最大 IPO。

Regarding the first-day break below the offering price, Jiemian News cited industry analysis attributing it to a combination of multiple factors: the Hong Kong stock market fluctuated downwards on the day, with technology and consumer manufacturing sectors collectively pulling back; market disagreement on Luxshare Precision's short-term performance growth pace; coupled with the large scale of this IPO, concentrated selling pressure from the circulating shares during the day, and insufficient short-term capital uptake. 对于首日破发，界面新闻援引业内分析认为系多重因素叠加所致：港股大盘当日震荡走弱，科技与消费制造板块集体回调；市场对立讯精密短期业绩增长节奏存在分歧；加之本次 IPO 发行体量较大，盘中流通盘抛压集中，短线资金承接力度不足。

item.title: 长鑫科技 7 月 16 日申购，295 亿募资创科创板纪录
item.guid: 长鑫科技-7-月-16-日申购，295-亿募资创科创板纪录
item.description:
CXMT yesterday disclosed its STAR Market IPO prospectus, with the new share subscription date set for July 16, stock code '688825', online subscription code '787825', and payment deadline on July 20. 长鑫科技于昨日披露科创板 IPO 招股意向书，新股申购日定为7月16日，证券代码「688825」，网上申购代码「787825」，缴款截止日为7月20日。

This offering plans to issue 6.688 billion shares, accounting for approximately 10% of the total share capital after issuance, raising RMB 29.5 billion, setting a new fundraising record for a STAR Market IPO. The funds will be used for DRAM wafer production line upgrades and forward-looking technology R&D, with a total investment of RMB 34.5 billion for the three projects. 本次拟发行 66.88 亿股，占发行后总股本约10%，募集资金 295 亿元人民币，创科创板 IPO 募资纪录。资金将用于 DRAM 晶圆产线升级及前瞻技术研发，三个项目合计总投资 345 亿元。

In terms of offering structure, 50% of the shares are for strategic placement, with 377 company executives and core employees participating in subscriptions through asset management plans, with a cap of RMB 1.593 billion; the remaining strategic investors have a subscription cap of RMB 10.844 billion. Joint sponsor CICC also received a 15% over-allotment option. 发行结构上，50% 股份用于战略配售，其中公司 377 名高管和核心员工以资管计划形式参与认购，上限15.93 亿元；其余战略投资者认购上限 108.44 亿元。联席保荐人中金公司还获授15%的超额配售选择权。

Regarding performance, CXMT expects revenue for the first half of this year to be between RMB 110 billion and RMB 120 billion, a year-on-year increase of over six times; net profit attributable to the parent company is expected to be between RMB 50 billion and RMB 57 billion, a year-on-year increase of approximately 22 to 25 times. The company attributes this to the continuous rise in DRAM prices driven by global AI computing power demand. 业绩方面，长鑫科技预计今年上半年营收 1100 亿至 1200 亿元，同比增长逾六倍；归母净利润 500 亿至 570 亿元，同比增长约 22 至 25 倍。公司将此归因于全球 AI 算力需求拉动 DRAM 价格持续上涨。

item.title: 💡 黄仁勋：英伟达工程师现在更愿意构建 AI 智能体，而不是写代码
item.guid: 💡-黄仁勋：英伟达工程师现在更愿意构建-AI-智能体，而不是写代码
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang recently stated in an interview video released by the company that the company's software engineers are increasingly inclined to build AI agents rather than write code. 据《商业内幕》报道，英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋近日在一段由公司发布的采访视频中表示，公司软件工程师越来越倾向于构建 AI 智能体，而非编写代码。

Huang pointed out that the introduction of AI is reducing engineers' daily coding work, replaced by building AI agents, setting benchmarks, and establishing protective mechanisms. 黄仁勋指出，AI 的引入正在减少工程师的日常编码工作，取而代之的是构建 AI 智能体、制定基准测试与设置防护机制。

He stated that this type of work 'requires imagination, creativity, and extensive technical accumulation,' which is fundamentally different from the previous code-input-centric work model. 他表示，这类工作「需要想象力、需要创造力，以及大量的技术积累」，与此前以代码输入为主的工作模式存在本质差异。

On the issue of employment impact, Huang once again refuted the view that AI will largely replace white-collar jobs. He believes that AI is creating a large number of new positions rather than eliminating existing ones. 在就业影响问题上，黄仁勋再次驳斥了 AI 将大规模替代白领岗位的观点。他认为，AI 正在创造大量新职位，而非消除现有岗位。

item.title: 售价 15199 元，索尼超长焦黑卡 RX10 V 发布
item.guid: 售价-15199-元，索尼超长焦黑卡-RX10-V-发布
item.description:
Sony yesterday released the Cyber-shot® ultra-telephoto flagship RX10 V (DSC-RX10M5), with a suggested retail price of RMB 15,199. Pre-orders began today, and it will officially launch in mid-July. 索尼昨日发布黑卡® 超长焦旗舰 RX10 V（DSC-RX10M5），建议零售价 15199 元，即日开启预售，7 月中旬正式上市。

  • Sensor: 1-inch stacked Exmor RS CMOS, approximately 20.1 million effective pixels, paired with BIONZ XR processor; 传感器：1 英寸堆栈式 Exmor RS CMOS，约 2010 万有效像素，搭配 BIONZ XR 处理器；
  • Lens: Zeiss Vario-Sonnar T* F2.4-4.0, equivalent to 24-600mm, 25x optical zoom, supports optical image stabilization; 镜头：蔡司 Vario-Sonnar T* F2.4-4.0，等效 24-600mm，25 倍光学变焦，支持光学防抖；
  • Focus: AI subject recognition (people, animals, birds, insects, cars, trains, airplanes), AF/AE calculation up to 60 times/second, tracking continuous shooting up to 30 frames/second; 对焦：AI 主体识别（人、动物、鸟类、昆虫、汽车、火车、飞机），AF/AE 运算最高 60 次/秒，追踪连拍最高 30 张/秒；
  • Video: 4K 120P (with crop), supports S-Log3, S-Cinetone, can import up to 16 sets of LUTs; 视频：4K 120P（画面有裁切），支持 S-Log3、S-Cinetone，可导入最多 16 组 LUT；
  • Viewfinder: 0.5-inch Quad-VGA OLED, approximately 3.68 million dots, magnification approximately 0.78x; 取景器：0.5 英寸 Quad-VGA OLED，约 368 万点，放大倍率约 0.78 倍；
  • Battery Life: NP-FZ100 battery, up to approximately 630 still shots in LCD mode, an increase of about 50% compared to the predecessor RX10 IV; 续航：NP-FZ100 电池，LCD 模式下静态拍摄最高约 630 张，较前代 RX10 IV 提升约 50%；

    • Connectivity: Wi-Fi 2.4/5GHz, USB Type-C, supports 4K 30P live output.

item.title: 小米澎程 SkyNomad 预热车内「可变大空间」
item.guid: 小米澎程-SkyNomad-预热车内「可变大空间」
item.description:
Xiaomi Auto officially announced its new series SkyNomad Xiaomi Pengcheng yesterday, positioned as a "smart variable large-space SUV," creating a differentiated layout from the previous SU7/YU7 series. 小米汽车昨日正式官宣旗下全新系列 SkyNomad 小米澎程，定位为「智能可变大空间 SUV」，与此前的 SU7/YU7 系列形成差异化布局。

In terms of product philosophy, the official explanation of the brand's connotation uses the two English words "Sky" and "Nomad," emphasizing "a longing for a free and unconstrained life between heaven and earth." 在产品理念上，官方以「Sky（天空）」和「Nomad（游牧者）」两个英文词拆解品牌内涵，强调「天地之间，自由自在的生活向往」。

The official definition of "freedom" is broken down into three dimensions: eliminating range anxiety, comfortable stays whether in the city or by the mountains and sea, and having an independently usable private space anywhere. 官方将「自在」拆解为三个维度：免除里程焦虑、不论城市或山海都能舒适停留、在任何地方拥有一个可自主使用的独立空间。

Space configuration is a core selling point of the Pengcheng series. The official statement says that through smart technology, spatial design, and engineering capabilities, Pengcheng can flexibly switch the same in-car space to different usage states, including "a studio for one, a coffee shop for two, a reception room for three, a playground for the whole family," defining the entire vehicle as "a mobile world with freely transformable space combinations according to one's desires." 空间形态是澎程系列的核心卖点。官方称，通过智能科技、空间设计与工程能力，澎程可让同一车内空间灵活切换不同使用状态，包括「一个人的工作室、两个人的咖啡馆、三个人的会客厅、全家人的游乐场」，并将整车定义为「可随心意自由变换空间组合的移动世界」。

item.title: 任天堂 Switch 2 欧洲新版今秋上市，电池可更换、机身重 548 克
item.guid: 任天堂-Switch-2-欧洲新版今秋上市，电池可更换、机身重-548-克
item.description:
According to IGN, Nintendo will launch a new version of Switch 2 in the European market starting this autumn, with the core change being a built-in replaceable battery to meet the EU's upcoming battery regulations. 据 IGN 报道，任天堂将于今秋起在欧洲市场推出新版 Switch 2，核心变化在于内置可更换电池，以满足欧盟即将生效的电池法规要求。

The battery capacity of the new console is reduced by about 1% compared to the current version, resulting in a slight increase in body weight—including Joy-Con 2 controllers, it increases from 534 grams to 548 grams; without controllers, it increases from 401 grams to 411 grams. In terms of functionality, Nintendo states that the revised version is no different from the current version. 新版主机的电池容量较现行版本缩减约 1%，机身重量因此小幅增加——包含 Joy-Con 2 控制器从 534 克升至 548 克，不带控制器时从 401 克升至 411 克。功能方面，任天堂表示修订版与现行版本无差异。

According to the plan, product updates will be rolled out in batches: 按计划，产品更新将分批推进：

    The first to be launched this summer is a new version of the Switch 1 Joy-Con, with unchanged battery capacity and weight;

    Starting this autumn, the entire Switch 2 console and its accompanying Joy-Con 2 will switch to the replaceable battery version;

    Starting this winter, separately sold Switch 2 Joy-Con and Pro controllers will also follow suit, with the Pro controller's battery capacity reduced by 16%, while its overall weight is reduced by 7 grams;

    Regarding retro controllers, the N64 controller released from early next year will weigh 1 gram, and the GameCube controller will weigh 5 grams. Corresponding battery replacement kits will be sold separately in the European Nintendo Store, with specific release dates yet to be announced.

It is worth noting that Nintendo chose not to release a new European version for Switch 1, but instead directly withdrew the console from the European market. 值得注意的是，任天堂选择不为 Switch 1 推出欧版新版本，而是直接将该主机退出欧洲市场。

item.title: 理想 i9 官宣：定位家庭纯电旗舰 SUV，9 月发布
item.guid: 理想-i9-官宣：定位家庭纯电旗舰-SUV，9-月发布
item.description:
Li Xiang, CEO of Li Auto, posted on Weibo yesterday, announcing that a new member, the Li Auto i9, will be added to its "9 Series" flagship SUV family, and previewing its debut in September this year. 理想汽车 CEO 李想昨日在微博发文，宣布旗下「9 系」旗舰 SUV 家族将新增一款成员——理想 i9，并预告其将于今年 9 月亮相。

The i9's rear features a special "Home" emblem, and a Home version will be launched, making it Li Auto's second Home product after MEGA. i9 车尾搭载特殊的「Home」徽标，将推出 Home 版本，这也将是继 MEGA 之后理想的第二款 Home 产品。

In terms of dimensions, the i9 has a length of 5225mm and a wheelbase of 3168mm. Li Xiang positions it as a "family pure electric flagship SUV," emphasizing large space and comfort as its core demands. 尺寸规格方面，i9 车长达 5225mm，轴距 3168mm，李想将其定位为「家庭纯电旗舰 SUV」，强调大空间与舒适性是其核心诉求。

item.title: 蚂蚁灵波开源 LingBot-World 2.0，支持小时级实时生成
item.guid: 蚂蚁灵波开源-LingBot-World-2.0，支持小时级实时生成
item.description:
On July 8, Ant Lingbo Technology open-sourced its new generation real-time interactive world model, LingBot-World 2.0, and simultaneously upgraded the world model experience feature in the Lingguang App. 7 月 8 日，蚂蚁灵波科技开源新一代实时交互世界模型 LingBot-World 2.0，并同步升级灵光 App 世界模型体验功能。

Compared to the first generation open-sourced in January this year (with a maximum stable generation of about 10 minutes), the 2.0 version mainly features the following upgrades: 相比今年 1 月开源的第一代（最长稳定生成约 10 分钟），2.0 版本主要升级如下：

    Supports hour-long real-time continuous generation, 720p/60fps HD output, with virtually no delay in keyboard control

    Added interactive actions such as attack, archery, spellcasting, shooting, jumping, and gliding, supporting text-triggered events like day-night cycles and weather changes

    Industry's first introduction of a dual Agent mechanism: Pilot Agent is responsible for character behavior planning, and Director Agent drives scene evolution in real-time.

    Supports multiple users simultaneously entering and interacting in the same world.

The new version of Lingguang App integrates LingBot-World 2.0, supporting 720P quality, smooth operation at over 30 frames per second, and interaction response latency in the hundreds of milliseconds on mobile devices. 灵光 App 新版接入 LingBot-World 2.0，手机端支持 720P 画质、30 帧以上流畅运行、百毫秒级交互响应延迟。

🔗 Related Reading: LingBot-World 2.0 Hands-on: A World of Infinite Duration and Random Changes, Is It Finally Here? 🔗 相关阅读： LingBot-World 2.0 实测：无限时长、随机变化的世界，终于来了？

item.title: 日本消费者排队 9 小时抢购，大疆影石合占日本摄像机市场 85%
item.guid: 日本消费者排队-9-小时抢购，大疆影石合占日本摄像机市场-85%
item.description:
According to China Newsweek, Insta360's flagship gimbal camera Luna Ultra recently held its debut event in Shibuya, Tokyo, sparking a buying frenzy, with some consumers queuing for nearly 9 hours; DJI's Pocket 4, a compact gimbal camera launched concurrently, topped the sales charts in Japan just 9 days after its release. 据中新经纬报道，影石旗舰云台相机 Luna Ultra 于近日在东京涩谷举行首发活动，现场掀起抢购热潮，有消费者排队近 9 小时；大疆同期推出的小型云台相机 Pocket 4 在日本上市仅 9 天便跻身销量榜首。

According to data from BCN Ranking, a leading Japanese consumer electronics market data agency, the combined market share of DJI and Insta360, two Shenzhen-based brands, in Japan's consumer camera market reached 85% in April this year, significantly outperforming local brands such as Sony, Panasonic, and Canon. 根据日本权威消费电子市场数据统计机构 BCN Ranking 的数据，今年 4 月，大疆与影石两家深圳品牌在日本消费级摄像机市场的合计份额已达 85%，索尼、松下、佳能等本土品牌被大幅甩开。

Analysts believe that the key for domestic brands to achieve this overtake lies in accurately identifying and filling gaps in user experience upgrades. Insta360 entered the market with "panoramic action cameras," carving out a new niche amidst the dominance of GoPro, Samsung, and Ricoh, and became the world's number one in panoramic camera shipments in just 3 years. 分析人士认为，国产品牌实现反超的关键在于精准识别并填补用户体验升级的空白。影石以「全景运动相机」切入，在 GoPro 与三星、理光各据一方的格局下另辟赛道，仅用 3 年便实现全景相机出货量全球第一。

item.title: 雀巢将在泰国投资 6.88 亿美元建设智能工厂和配送中心
item.guid: 雀巢将在泰国投资-6.88-亿美元建设智能工厂和配送中心
item.description:
According to Sina Finance, Thailand has approved a 23 billion Thai Baht investment project by Nestlé (Thai) Ltd., equivalent to approximately 688 million US dollars, for the construction of smart factories and distribution centers. 据新浪财经报道，泰国已批准雀巢泰国有限公司一笔 230 亿泰铢投资项目，约合 6.88 亿美元，用于建设智能工厂与配送中心。

The project is located in Samut Prakan Province in central Thailand, with a planned start of production in the fourth quarter of 2028. It will have an annual output of 170,000 tons of instant Nescafé, blended coffee beverages, and ready-to-drink beverages, and will create 520 new jobs. The Thai Board of Investment stated that the project serves Thailand's goal of becoming a regional food and beverage manufacturing hub. 项目选址在泰国中部沙没巴干府，计划 2028 年第四季度投产，年产速溶雀巢咖啡、复合咖啡饮品和即饮饮料 17 万吨，并新增 520 个就业岗位。泰国投资委员会称，该项目服务于泰国打造区域食品饮料制造中心。

item.title: 《沙丘3》第二支预告曝光：保罗与契妮决裂，死灵邓肯回归
item.guid: 《沙丘3》第二支预告曝光：保罗与契妮决裂，死灵邓肯回归
item.description:
"Dune 3" unveiled its second trailer yesterday, opening with a fierce breakup between the two characters. 《沙丘3》昨日曝光第二支预告，以两人的激烈决裂开场。

Chani (played by Zendaya) confronts and angrily rebukes Paul (played by Timothée Chalamet), signaling the fundamental breakdown of their relationship. The trailer also reveals that seventeen years have passed since the events of "Dune 2," and Paul has long shed his resistance to the "savior" identity, appearing in a completely different guise. 契妮（赞达亚 饰）当面怒斥保罗（提莫西·查拉梅 饰），昭示两人关系的根本破裂。预告同时显示，距《沙丘2》事件已过去十七年，保罗早已摆脱对「救世主」身份的抗拒，以截然不同的姿态现身。

This trailer also released new footage of several supporting characters: Jason Momoa's Duncan Idaho returns in a necromantic form; Robert Pattinson's "Face Dancer" Scytale makes a pale appearance; and Anya Taylor-Joy's Alia, covered in bloodstains, roars in anger, further hinting at a large-scale conflict. 此次预告还释出多位配角的全新画面：杰森·莫玛饰演的邓肯·艾达荷以死灵形态回归；罗伯特·帕丁森饰演的「变脸者」斯凯特尔苍白登场；安雅·泰勒-乔伊饰演的厄莉娅满脸血痕怒吼，剧情走向进一步指向大规模冲突。

item.title: 章若楠金靖主演《想你了》提档，7 月 17 日上映
item.guid: 章若楠金靖主演《想你了》提档，7-月-17-日上映
item.description:
The movie "Miss You" released its new poster yesterday, officially announcing that its release date has been moved up to July 17th. 电影《想你了》昨日发布提档海报，正式宣布将上映日期提前至 7 月 17 日。

The film is directed by Ma Yingxin, starring Zhang Ruonan and Jin Jing, and tells the story of Gao Fan (played by Zhang Ruonan) and Wang Meili (played by Jin Jing) who promise to be best friends for life. 影片由麻赢心执导，章若楠、金靖领衔主演，讲述了高凡（章若楠饰）与汪美丽（金靖饰）两人约定成为一辈子好朋友的故事。
